positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of interconnected celestial bodies and arcane flora. The scene features a central, glowing crystal heart surrounded by nebula gas clouds rendered in deep sapphire and shimmering emerald tones. Interlaced with the cosmos are intricate bioluminescent vines and geometric constellations forming a mandalic pattern. The overall style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Cosmic Sci-Fi, utilizing clean, strong silhouettes and highly saturated, jewel-toned colors. The composition must be perfectly balanced, designed to look excellent as a central graphic on an apparel print, with sharp edges and high contrast against a neutral background. Include small, stylized golden or silver metallic accents that catch the light.
negative: blurry, grain, watermark, signature, text, noise, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, messy, grainy, amateur
